creator: ant-x@rambler.ru
text:
I have exactly the same problem on FreeBSD 14.1. My detailed report is on the mailing list:

  <https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-stable/2024-July/002249.html>

Let me know if I should rather post it here. I ask Christos to please provide the same information as I did in the post above.
